verification.notRequested: If you didn't request this code, please ignore this email.

noShow.subject: Action Required: Missed Training Session - Master Driving School
noShow.intro: We noticed that you did not attend your scheduled training session for {courseName} on {date} ({session}).
noShow.feeNote: As per our Cancellation and Refund Policy (Section 3), a rescheduling fee of ₱1,000.00 is required for unattended sessions before you can re-book.
howToSteps: Log in to your student portal.
Select a new training date from the available schedules.

receipt.subjectFull: Full Payment Service Invoice - Master Driving School
receipt.subjectDown: Downpayment Service Invoice & Balance Reminder - Master Driving School
receipt.introFull: Your full payment has been received and confirmed. Here is your official service invoice.
receipt.introDown: Your downpayment has been received. Please see your balance details and how to settle it below.
receipt.pdfNote: 📎 A PDF copy of your service invoice is attached to this email ({filename}). Please save it for your records.
receipt.balanceNote: To complete your enrollment, please settle your remaining balance of ₱{amount}.
receipt.balanceStepsHeading: How to Pay Your Remaining Balance:
balanceSteps: Log in to your student account on our website
Click "Pay Balance Online" on your enrollment
Choose your preferred payment method (GCash, Cash)
Or pay in person at the branch on your first day of class
receipt.successNote: Your enrollment is fully paid. See you on your training date!
receipt.footerTagline: If you have any questions, contact our support team.

downpaymentReminder.heading: 💳 Remaining Balance Reminder:
downpaymentReminder.note: Since your payment type is Downpayment, please note that you must settle your remaining balance when you go to the branch on the first or second day of your class.

vehicleRental.heading: ℹ️ Vehicle Rental Requirement:
vehicleRental.tricycleNote: For Practical Driving Course (PDC) - A1 TRICYCLE, students are required to rent their own Tricycle for the course instead of using the school's vehicle because we only have one unit for all branches.

requirements.heading: 📌 Requirements to Bring on Your Schedule Date:
tdc: Be timely and attend all 15 hours (split over sessions/days as scheduled)
Proof of Payment (You can use this email as your service invoice)
pdc: Proof of Payment (You can use this email as your service invoice)

terms.heading: 📜 Terms and Conditions
items: Students must arrive at least 30 minutes before their scheduled session.
Rescheduling must be done at least 24 hours before the scheduled date.
No-show on the scheduled date may result in forfeiture of the session.
Refunds are subject to the school's refund policy (processing fee may apply).
Students must bring all required documents on the training date.
The school reserves the right to reschedule sessions due to unforeseen circumstances.
Students must follow all safety guidelines and instructions during training.
Completion certificates will be issued only after fulfilling all course requirements.
Personal belongings are the responsibility of the student during training.
By enrolling or creating an account, you agree to receive News, Events, and Promotional emails from Master Driving School.
By enrolling, you agree to abide by all rules and regulations of Master Driving School.

news.intro: We have a new update for you from Master Driving School!
news.unsubNote: You received this email because you enrolled or created an account at Master Driving School.

pdf.footerLine1: Master Driving School  •  This is an acknowledgement receipt
